name: SearchCodebase

target_directories.description: 要搜索的特定目录。必须使用绝对路径。

description_zh: UniDo的上下文引擎，使用自然语言搜索代码。维护代码库的实时索引。支持跨不同编程语言检索。仅反映磁盘上的当前状态。
description_en: UniDo's context engine that uses natural language to search code. Maintains a real-time index of the codebase. Can retrieve across different programming languages. Only reflects the current state on disk.
examples_zh: 搜索认证逻辑: information_request="认证逻辑"
在特定目录搜索: information_request="API端点", target_directories=["/path/to/api"]
examples_en: Search for authentication logic: information_request="authentication logic"
Search in specific directory: information_request="API endpoints", target_directories=["/path/to/api"]
